goal: Implement continuous business analytics from memory knowledge, IMAP email contents, documents and optional DMS/API enrichment.
global_constraints: Do not store mailbox credentials, DMS credentials or host-specific endpoints in the repository.
IMAP is the baseline email adapter; Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace are optional enhanced adapters.
Email content analysis requires explicit source policy and scope rules.
Run DLP and scope gates before AI analysis.
Use extract-once-derive-many: one extraction packet feeds memory and analytics.
Raw email/document payloads are disabled by default or retained only under explicit quarantine/archive policy.
Do not bypass memory governance, safe corpus, graph review or analytics access audit.
Duplicate evidence must be linked, not silently deleted.
DMS remains source of truth for registered documents when present.
Bulk analytics data lives under data/analytics/; memory runtime data lives under data/memory/.
verification_commands: python manage.py test apps.analytics.tests apps.memory.tests apps.core.tests
